title: Storage arbitrage policy
summary: A battery dispatch policy evolved against frozen OMIE day-ahead prices, showing objective improvement while preserving auditable operating behavior.
problem_statement: Find a deterministic storage dispatch policy that improves price-arbitrage performance under fixed battery constraints and scenario-level validation.

evaluation_contract.summary: Candidates are scored on a frozen set of day-ahead price scenarios. The objective is lower-is-better and combines regret against an oracle with validity checks for power, state-of-charge, and terminal constraints.

website.card_summary: A battery dispatch policy is evaluated across fixed price scenarios and retained only when the governed objective improves.
